title: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
summary: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect on you if your Strength is already 19 or higher.

contentBlocks.text: Gauntlets of Ogre Power Wondrous item, uncommon (requires attunement)
Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect on you if your Strength is already 19 or higher.
